spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1182 This isn't a spoiler, just a thought: I believe Luffy hasn't truly awakened yet or hasn't yet reached his full potential. I think there will be a stronger version in Nika's form, which Oda is saving for later. (I will explain why I think this later).
